Class ProfileSettingsActivity

android.app.Activity
androidx.core.app.ComponentActivity
androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
com.example.codebase.ProfileSettingsActivity
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.contextaware.ContextAware, androidx.activity.FullyDrawnReporterOwner, androidx.activity.OnBackPressedDispatcherOwner, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultRegistryOwner, androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBarDrawerToggle.DelegateProvider, androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.OnRequestPermissionsResultCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.RequestPermissionsRequestCodeValidator, androidx.core.app.OnMultiWindowModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.OnNewIntentProvider, androidx.core.app.OnPictureInPictureModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.TaskStackBuilder.SupportParentable, androidx.core.content.OnConfigurationChangedProvider, androidx.core.content.OnTrimMemoryProvider, androidx.core.view.KeyEventDispatcher.Component, androidx.core.view.MenuHost, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner
public class ProfileSettingsActivity extends androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
Activity for creating or updating a user's profile information.

Operates in two distinct modes controlled by EXTRA_FIRST_RUN:

  • First-run mode — shown during initial onboarding. The back button is disabled and the user must complete the form before proceeding to OrganizerActivity. Clears the WelcomeActivity.KEY_PROFILE_PENDING flag on successful save.
  • Edit mode — shown for returning users updating an existing profile. Normal back-navigation is permitted.

On launch the activity attempts to pre-populate fields from AppCache (synchronous) and then from UserRepository (asynchronous Firestore fetch).

Satisfies user stories US 01.02.01 and US 01.02.02.

  • Field Details

    • EXTRA_FIRST_RUN

      public static final String EXTRA_FIRST_RUN
      Boolean
      invalid reference 
      Intent
      extra that controls the activity's operating mode.
      • true — first-run / onboarding mode.
      • false (default) — profile-edit mode.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • onCreate

      protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Initialises the activity, resolves the operating mode, populates UI views, and triggers an asynchronous profile load from UserRepository.

      onCreate in class androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
      Parameters:
      savedInstanceState - If the activity is being re-created from a previous state, this bundle contains the most recent data; otherwise null.

    • onBackPressed

      public void onBackPressed()
      Intercepts the back button to enforce mandatory profile completion in first-run mode.

      If isFirstRun is true, a

      invalid reference 
      Toast
      reminds the user that profile setup is required and back navigation is suppressed. Otherwise, the default back behaviour is preserved.
      Overrides:
      onBackPressed in class androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
